fundamentals.name: AppLovin Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: AppLovin Corporation provides end-to-end artificial intelligence-powered advertising solutions for businesses in the United States and internationally. It operates through two segments, Advertising and Apps. The company offers Axon Ads Manager, a suite of marketing solutions that enables developers to automate, optimize, and manage marketing efforts; MAX, an in-app bidding technology that optimizes the value of a publisher's advertising inventory by running a real-time competitive auction; Adjust, a measurement and analytics marketing platform; and Wurl, a connected TV platform, which distributes streaming video for content companies, provides advertising and publishing solutions. It serves individuals, small and independent businesses, enterprises, advertisers and advertising networks, mobile app publishers, and indie studio developers. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth, highly profitable company with strong margins and cash flow, though carrying significant debt.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 3.4%; next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Revenue growth 59.0% YoY and Earnings growth 113.1% YoY indicate robust expansion.
Exceptional margins: Gross margin 88.4%, Operating margin 78.2%, Profit margin 64.3%.
Return on equity at 266.4% and Return on assets at 44.2% show excellent capital efficiency.
Strong Free cash flow of $3.18B (TTM) supports operations and potential investments.
Consensus is 'strong_buy' with a mean target price of $648.10.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 162.89% indicates significant leverage.
Price/Book of 87.24 and Price/Sales of 33.41 suggest a high valuation.
Beta of 2.37 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: AppLovin (APP) stock is experiencing upward momentum, driven by a combination of analyst attention and broader market trends, including the launch of a "Trump Accounts" app that has also boosted Robinhood's (HOOD) shares. While one analyst has reset their forecast based on a "hidden metric," the company's ambition and discipline are under scrutiny. The stock's performance is also influenced by its strong growth in revenue and earnings, with a significant beat on its last reported EPS.

headlines.title: Trump accounts and AI agents send Robinhood stock soaring
Why AppLovin (APP) Stock Is Trading Up Today
Robinhood stock gains after Trump Accounts app launches (HOOD:NASDAQ)
Analyst resets AppLovin stock forecast on hidden metric
